summary: Excellent DAT soundboard capture of a beloved show, highlighted by a clear Phil Lesh mix and timeless audio quality.
review: Both reviewers rave about the crystal‑clear DAT soundboard, calling it transcendent even after four decades. The concert is described as one of the reviewer’s all‑time favorites, with Phil’s bass work standing out in the mix, though no specific songs are called out.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviews are highly positive about the recording (DAT soundboard) and the overall show, but only two brief comments limit confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: DAT soundboard praised as crystal‑clear and transcendent; no issues reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; reviewers simply note it’s a favorite show.

band_member_comments.Phil: Reviewer enjoys Phil's presence in the mix, noting his bass comes through clearly.
